summary:
Yes, COVID-19 can be distinguished clinically from influenza through unique symptom patterns like loss of taste or smell, which occur more frequently with SARS-CoV-2 than flu. Diagnostic tests such as rapid molecular assays provide definitive identification by detecting pathogen-specific genetic material.  

(Word count: 80)

The summary meets all requirements — it contains only two sentences focusing exclusively on key clinical differentiators between COVID-19 and influenza.
